title: Academic Years
description: Manage academic sessions, terms, and year activation.
noYearsDescription: Create your first academic year to get started with standards, sections, and subjects.
label: Academic Year Label
labelDescription: Displayed across timetables, fee receipts, and report cards.
labelFormatError: Label must be in YYYY-YY format (e.g. 2025-26).
startDateDescription: First working day of the academic session.
endDateDescription: Last working day of the academic session.
termStructureDescription: Optional: divide the session into terms for exams and reports.
terms: {count, plural, =0 {No terms} one {1 term} other {# terms}}
activateConfirm: Activating {year} will deactivate the current active year. All users will see the new year as active. Continue?
activated: {year} is now the active academic year
archiveConfirm: Archiving {year} will make it read-only. This cannot be undone. Continue?
editDescription: Update the session dates, label, and term structure. Changes apply immediately.
readOnlyNotice: This academic year is archived and cannot be edited.
draftRestoredDescription: We restored changes you had not saved yet.
termsEmpty: No terms yet. Add terms to split the session (e.g. Term 1, Term 2).
labelRequired: Please enter a label for this academic year.
termDateRequired: Term start and end dates are required.
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {year}? This action cannot be undone.

errors.INVALID_DATE_RANGE: End date must be after start date
errors.ACADEMIC_YEAR_OVERLAP: Date range overlaps with an existing academic year
errors.YEAR_ALREADY_ACTIVE: Another academic year is already active
errors.termOutOfRange: Term dates must be within the academic year range

accessDenied: You do not have permission to view academic years.
